decision: At fixed deterministic hierarchy, prior-only K=32 counterfactuals, data, and seed, is the primitive GAR learner's failure caused by optimization sensitivity or objective shape? Compare MSE-only and pairwise-plus-0.25-MSE at learning rates 1e-4, 3e-4, and 1e-3. A recipe remains viable only if it is finite and non-collapsed, keeps held-out pair accuracy at or above 0.80, materially improves full-vocabulary reference top-5 or constrained-planning top-20 recall over the 3e-4 anchor, and yields at least one valid token fragment; otherwise stop tuning this end-to-end goal-value interface and redirect to a separately fitted primitive advantage head or a different action representation.

jobs.purpose: Single-seed matched optimization screen for the non-symbolic primitive GAR learner. Each of MSE-only and rank-plus-MSE receives the same three-point log learning-rate curve; executable validity and reference recall gate any continuation.
